projects.title: SnapFlood — Crowdsourced Flood Intelligence
projects.summary: A deployed citizen-science app collecting geotagged urban-flood reports across Web, Android and iOS to build a real-time flood archive.

projects.title: UFIS — Urban Flood Information System
projects.summary: An integrated system to forecast rainfall and floods and deliver flood-relevant information in advance across a city, focused on Hyderabad.

projects.title: Riverine Flood Forecasting
projects.summary: Hydrologic-hydrodynamic and statistical-dynamical flood-inundation forecasting across major Indian river basins.

projects.title: Radar-based Rainfall Nowcasting
projects.summary: Deep-learning rainfall nowcasting and forecasting from radar reflectivity data for short-lead warning.

projects.title: Urban Flood-Risk Mapping
projects.summary: Flood-risk mapping that integrates hazard, exposure and vulnerability to guide planning and response.

projects.title: Satellite Rainfall Evaluation
projects.summary: Assessing satellite precipitation (IMERG) across space and time scales for developing urban regions in India.

projects.title: Social-Media Flood Extraction
projects.summary: Extracting flood-relevant information and hotspots from social media to enrich real-time flood awareness.

projects.title: VarshaAnalytics
projects.summary: A rainfall-analytics product grown from the VarshaMitra community mascot — bringing station, satellite and model rainfall into one accessible view.
